creator: gaod@hychen.org
text:
Hi,

It seems fine.

Best regards,
gaod

2010/12/26 Sunpoet Po-Chuan Hsieh <sunpoet@freebsd.org>:
> Hi,
>
> =A0I've made some modifications. Please review them. The changes include:
> =A0- Rename check: to regression-test: which is used by tinderbox
> =A0- use PLIST_FILES instead of PLIST
> =A0- Use <bsd.port.mk>
> =A0Thanks.
>
> Best regards,
> sunpoet
>
> --- libsigsegv.patch begins here ---
> Index: Makefile
> =3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=
=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=
=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D
> RCS file: /home/ncvs/ports/devel/libsigsegv/Makefile,v
> retrieving revision 1.15
> diff -u -r1.15 Makefile
> --- Makefile =A0 =A04 Dec 2010 07:31:18 -0000 =A0 =A0 =A0 1.15
> +++ Makefile =A0 =A025 Dec 2010 19:37:58 -0000
> @@ -6,10 +6,9 @@
> =A0#
>
> =A0PORTNAME=3D =A0 =A0 =A0libsigsegv
> -PORTVERSION=3D =A0 2.8
> +PORTVERSION=3D =A0 2.9
> =A0CATEGORIES=3D =A0 =A0devel
> -MASTER_SITES=3D =A0${MASTER_SITE_GNU}
> -MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=3D =A0 =A0libsigsegv
> +MASTER_SITES=3D =A0GNU/libsigsegv
>
> =A0MAINTAINER=3D =A0 =A0gaod@hychen.org
> =A0COMMENT=3D =A0 =A0 =A0 Handling page faults in user mode
> @@ -17,12 +16,16 @@
> =A0USE_AUTOTOOLS=3D libtool
> =A0USE_LDCONFIG=3D =A0yes
>
> -.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
> +PLIST_FILES=3D =A0 include/sigsegv.h \
> + =A0 =A0 =A0 =A0 =A0 =A0 =A0 lib/libsigsegv.a \
> + =A0 =A0 =A0 =A0 =A0 =A0 =A0 lib/libsigsegv.la \
> + =A0 =A0 =A0 =A0 =A0 =A0 =A0 lib/libsigsegv.so.2 \
> + =A0 =A0 =A0 =A0 =A0 =A0 =A0 lib/libsigsegv.so
>
> =A0post-install:
> =A0 =A0 =A0 =A0@${CAT} ${PKGMESSAGE}
>
> -check: build
> +regression-test: build
> =A0 =A0 =A0 =A0@cd ${WRKSRC} && ${SETENV} ${MAKE_ENV} ${MAKE} ${MAKE_FLAG=
S} ${MAKEFILE} ${MAKE_ARGS} check
>
> -.include <bsd.port.post.mk>
> +.include <bsd.port.mk>
